headline: Abbott’s Whoop Investment Puts Digital Health Wearables On Shareholders’ Radar
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) has invested in Whoop's US$575m Series G funding round as a strategic participant. The deal links Abbott's medical device and diagnostics expertise with Whoop's health wearable and insights platform focused on consumer users. The investment highlights Abbott's interest in digital health wearables and consumer facing health data solutions. For a company best known for diagnostics, medical devices and nutrition products, Abbott's move into a US$575m funding...
